_comment: CTK-088 fixture for parse_shopify._should_keep in_stock_only extension. Four synthetic Shopify-shape products exercising the availability gate: a buyable coral (>=1 available variant) / a sold-out coral (all variants available=false) / a buyable product carrying a denylist tag (in_stock_only + tag_denylist AND-interaction) / a sold-out product that would otherwise pass an allowlist (proves in_stock_only short-circuits independent of category_filter). Mirrors POTO's live-sale archive shape: product_type='live sale', per-variant available is the only stock signal.

products.title: Sold-out product that would pass an allowlist
